title: Integration v2 — Anchor + Door + Intent Firewall
notes: Per-project connection: Plexus now lives only inside its projects (.mcp.json) — no more global presence in every AI session
Project doors: one-click Start AI + a copyable connect code (plexus work <name>) on every project card
Intent firewall: the AI checks that your request belongs to THIS project before its first write, and offers the right door if not
Evidence quarantine: unverified graph deposits wait in a pending tray instead of entering the brain (auto-promote / expire / one-click review)
Engines retire themselves when their project is deleted; projects-base guard asks before rooting a brain at your projects folder

title: Resolution lifecycle + self-update
notes: Issue resolution tracking: solved / conditional / partial / unsolved / regression-risk
Regression gate — simulations flag changes that threaten confirmed fixes
Resolutions panel on the connectome (troubleshooting roadmap)
One-click engine self-update from the connectome page
